plot_loess <- ggplot(core_with_rCMRGIc[-c(7,8),][core_with_rCMRGIc$Model=="Brownian (BM)",], aes(x = rCMRGIc, y = `Diff.pre`)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = F, color = "#377eb8", span=0.2) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    title = "Correlation between rCMRGIc and Prediction Error (BM)",
    x = "rCMRGIc (µmol/100 g/min.)",
    y = "Prediction Error (Diff.pre) under Brownian Model"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  ylim(-3.5, 0.6
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Structure), nudge_x = 0.5, size = 3, check_overlap = TRUE)

  plot_loess

## Filter first to keep only Brownian model and remove NeoW_Frahm (smallest rCMRGIc value) and Insular cortex (grey) (second smallest rCMRGIc value)

# Filter
plot_data <- core_with_rCMRGIc %>%
  filter(Model == "Brownian (BM)") %>%
  slice(-c(7, 8))

# Then plot
plot_loess <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = rCMRGIc, y = `Diff.pre`)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "#377eb8", span = 0.2) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    title = "Correlation between rCMRGIc and Prediction Error (BM)",
    x = "rCMRGIc (µmol/100 g/min.)",
    y = "Prediction Error (Diff.pre) under Brownian Model"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  ylim(-3.5, 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Structure), nudge_x = 0.5, size = 3, check_overlap = TRUE)

plot_loess

# First filter for Brownian model
temp <- core_with_rCMRGIc[core_with_rCMRGIc$Model == "Brownian (BM)", ]
# Then remove rows 7 and 8 from the filtered data
temp <- temp[-c(7, 8), ]

plot_loess <- ggplot(temp, aes(x = rCMRGIc, y = `Diff.pre`)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "#377eb8", span = 0.75) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3.5, 0.6)) +  # Use this instead of ylim()
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    title = "Correlation between rCMRGIc and Prediction Error (BM)",
    x = "rCMRGIc (µmol/100 g/min.)",
    y = "Prediction Error (Diff.pre) under Brownian Model"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Structure), nudge_x = 0.5, size = 3, check_overlap = TRUE)

plot_loess



polyfit <- poly(`Brownian (BM)__Diff.pre` ~ rCMRGIc + I(rCMRGIc^2), data = cor_df)
  polyfit_summary <- summary(polyfit)
  polyfit_summary
